title: eragrostis perennis
intro: Eragrostis perennis, also known as the tufted love grass, is a type of perennial grass that is native to Africa and is widely cultivated in other parts of the world for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis perennis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can be used externally as a poultice or salve to treat skin conditions and wounds.
